edition.dagbeeld: Iran rouwt en zweert wraak, terwijl de wereld de opvolging van Khamenei in de gaten houdt; tegelijk viert een verdeeld Amerika zijn 250ste verjaardag onder onweer en politieke spanning. Op de achtergrond verscherpt China zijn grip op wetenschap en religie, en worstelt Europa met defensie en rechtsradicale verschuivingen.

article.title: Mourners Chant ‘Revenge’ at Funeral Prayers for Iran’s Slain Supreme Leader
article.summary: On the second day of public mourning for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed in February, there was still no sign of his son and successor, Mojtaba Khamenei.

opening.note: Wraakgeroep bij rouwgebeden Khamenei, opvolger nog altijd niet zichtbaar.
opening.label: breaking

article.title: America’s 250th celebrations marked by severe weather, political division

front.note: Amerika's 250ste verjaardag overschaduwd door politieke verdeeldheid en noodweer.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Peruvian and Colombian presidential elections: Expatriate vote helps far right clinch victory
article.summary: Peruvians living abroad helped Keiko Fujimori to win the presidency, even though only a minority of Peru's residents voted for her. Expatriate Colombians also massively backed Abelardo de la Espriella, though this was not as decisive.

front.note: Stemmen van expats geven extreem-rechts de overwinning in Peru en Colombia.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Ukraine striking Russian energy infrastructure at unprecedented rate
article.summary: Kyiv’s intensified drone campaign is spurring Russia’s worst fuel crisis in decades

front.note: Oekraïne treft Russische energiebronnen op ongekende schaal; ergste brandstofcrisis in decennia.
front.label: onderzoek

article.title: White Nationalists March in Washington Amid 250th Anniversary Celebrations
article.summary: The group, wearing clothing associated with the organization Patriot Front, assembled near Capitol Hill before leaving the district.

front.note: Witte nationalisten marcheerden in Washington midden in de jubileumvieringen.
front.label: reportage

article.title: Chinese underground church figure Jin Mingri freed from prison
article.summary: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.

front.note: Oprichter ondergrondse kerk vrijgelaten na direct verzoek Trump aan Xi.
front.label: breaking

article.title: Turkey sees its status in NATO rise, thanks to its weapons factories and Trump
article.summary: A friendship between presidents Donald Trump and Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and a need for weapons production, has changed how other NATO countries treat Turkey.

front.note: Trumps band met Erdogan tilt Turkije naar een hogere positie binnen de NAVO.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Could Farage quit? Questions swirl over Reform UK leader’s future
article.summary: Leader is under pressure over £5m gift, byelection losses and rise of rival Restore but allies say exit speculation is ‘wishful thinking’

front.note: Farage staat onder druk: geldschandaal, verloren tussenverkiezingen en een rivaal die opkomt.
front.label: analyse

items.title: French push to exclude UK from EU defence spending backfires
items.summary: Paris loses out on cheap loans due to strict eligibility criteria it had championed

items.title: Trump speaks with Putin and Zelensky ahead of NATO summit
items.summary: While both sides said the calls were to mark the 250th birthday of the US, Ukraine – and, during the call with the Kremlin, Iran – were also discussed.

items.title: Tienduizenden Albanezen bij 35e protest tegen de regering en een Trump-resort
items.summary: In de Albanese hoofdstad Tirana hebben tienduizenden mensen geprotesteerd tegen de regering van premier Rama, tegen corruptie en voor een verandering van de grondwet. items.title: China cools on overseas publication of scientific research
items.summary: Policymakers discuss reducing incentives for academics to submit papers to international journals over leak concerns

items.title: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
items.summary: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted about 6,000 pages related to energy conservation as a historic heatwave tears across the country. items.title: Bonus episode: Ernstfall — What if Russia attacks NATO?
items.summary: Today, we’re bringing you a special bonus episode from our colleagues at WELT. Originally released in German, Ernstfall is now available in English. What if Russia attacked NATO? How would Germany respond? And where are our weaknesses? We wanted answers. In a wargame, we simulate an attack on NATO’s eastern flank. Poli

items.title: In San Francisco’s A.I. Era, Even $180,000 Tech Salaries Are No Longer Enough
items.summary: As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare to go public, tech workers making six figures are grousing that they cannot compete with the new A.I. elite. Some doubt they can afford to stay.

items.summary: It takes effort to be an informed citizen. Artificial intelligence tools offer an alluring shortcut — but they’re not without risk.

items.summary: Nasdaq listing caps more than a decade of deals that transformed an Italian start-up into a global internet company

items.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
items.summary: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. items.title: Uber stalls European food delivery push as it pursues Delivery Hero takeover
items.summary: Ride-hailing company will no longer launch in five of its seven planned new markets this year

items.title: ME grijpt in meerdere steden in na ongeregeldheden rond WK-zege Marokko
items.summary: De Mobiele Eenheid (ME) heeft zaterdagavond in Rotterdam, Utrecht en Den Haag ingegrepen na ongeregeldheden rond de WK-overwinning van Marokko op Canada.

items.title: How to Avoid Spoilers Online and in Chats
items.summary: You can minimize the risk of films and shows being spoiled for you by muting comments, conversations, and keywords on various platforms.

items.summary: It’s a pretty good movie, but it needed to be a great movie to thrive in an oversaturated superhero market.

items.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

items.title: De Lelystadse jeugdzorg wordt steeds duurder. De directeur die daar iets aan deed, moest vertrekken
items.summary: In Lelystad woedde het afgelopen halfjaar een ongekende politieke machtsstrijd rondom jeugdhulp. Een experiment om de stijgende kosten in de hand te houden, kwam tot een lelijk einde. Daarmee verdoezelt de gemeente hoe slecht zij zelf heeft gepresteerd.

items.title: How Do You Celebrate America’s 250-Year Experiment? However You Want.
items.summary: Away from the turmoil in Washington, Americans will mark July 4 in their own patriotic ways. Expect rodeos, line dancing, Tejano music and Led Zeppelin.

items.title: What Does It Cost to Take Over Madison Square Garden?
items.summary: It’s not just rent. There’s security, insurance, permits and other costs, not to mention extra police presence.

items.summary: The Russian leader denounced Ukraine’s “imaginary achievements” on the battlefield of late, calling its leaders “play actors.”

items.summary: Zorgen is meer iets voor meisjes, krijgen veel jongens al vroeg mee. Niet verbazend dat zij daarin vervolgens achterblijven, schrijft Eva Marie de Waal . Laten we al onze kinderen opvoeden tot emotioneel volwassen mensen.
